title: Microthlaspi granatense
taxonomy: Microthlaspi granatense is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Brassicaceae. It belongs to the genus Microthlaspi and is often found in mountainous regions. Further, it is a member of the family Brassicaceae, which also includes mustard, cabbage, and horseradish species. The species is likely to be a part of the order Brassicales. This classification is based on the plant's characteristic morphological features and genetic traits.
